hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'index\.js$' && npm test 2>/dev/null || echo '⚠️  No tests configured yet. Run /test-mcp-tools to create tests.' || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; echo "$f" | grep -q 'package-lock\.json$' && echo '❌ Use npm install/update instead of editing package-lock.json directly' && exit 1 || exit 0; }
